_comment: Seed dictionary of Hebrew and Arabic cognates for common Semitic triliteral roots. Keyed by Latin transliteration of the root.

ar:mulk.bridge_concept_en: Property/dominion connects to E-B-D (to serve, slave)
ar:mulk.bridge_concept_es: Propiedad/dominio se conecta con E-B-D (servir, esclavizar)

ar:'amārah.bridge_concept_en: Sign/indication connects to A-TH-R (trace, mark, sign)
ar:'amārah.bridge_concept_es: Señal/indicación conecta con A-TH-R (huella, marca, señal)

heb:i'bud.bridge_concept_en: Processing and preparation are core meanings of T-KH-N (to grind, prepare)
heb:i'bud.bridge_concept_es: Procesamiento y preparación son significados centrales de T-KH-N (moler, preparar)

ar:ma'bud.bridge_concept_en: The root A-B-D has 'worshipped, venerated' as a core meaning, connecting to the outlier ma'bud (Arabic)
ar:ma'bud.bridge_concept_es: La raíz A-B-D tiene 'adorado, venerado' como un significado central, conectándose al sentido atípico ma'bud (árabe)

ar:hazara.bridge_concept_en: To guess connects to D-M-R (to be amazed, astonished)

ar:hadhara.bridge_concept_en: To be cautious connects to A-TH-R (to observe, pay attention)
ar:hadhara.bridge_concept_es: Ser cauteloso se conecta con A-TH-R (observar, prestar atención)

ar:taḥaḏḏar.bridge_concept_en: To be cautious connects to R-KH-Q (be far)

ar:nafaqa.bridge_concept_en: Spending connects to N-P-SH (to consume, use up)

ar:iftaraqa.bridge_concept_en: To divide, separate is core to the meaning of P-L-G
ar:iftaraqa.bridge_concept_es: Dividir, separar es central al significado de P-L-G

ar:hawa'.bridge_concept_es: Aire/viento se conecta con R-W-KH (espíritu, viento)

ar:hawā.bridge_concept_en: To fall connects to N-P-L (to fall, descend)
ar:hawā.bridge_concept_es: Caer se conecta con N-P-L (caer, descender)

ar:istaqaama.bridge_concept_en: To be upright connects to S-G-A (be many, grow)
ar:istaqaama.bridge_concept_es: Estar recto conecta con S-G-A (ser muchos, crecer)

heb:tsala.bridge_concept_en: To roast connects to SH-Q-Y (give to drink, irrigate)

heb:shelet.bridge_concept_en: A sign/shield is a kind of marker or flag (D-G-L)
heb:shelet.bridge_concept_es: Una señal/escudo es una clase de bandera o marcador (D-G-L)

heb:shil'shelet.bridge_concept_en: Chain is the core meaning of the root A-S-R (to bind, tie)
heb:shil'shelet.bridge_concept_es: Cadena es el significado central de la raíz A-S-R (atar, anudar)

ar:hawwala.bridge_concept_en: To transform, change is the core meaning of H-P-K (to turn, overturn)
ar:hawwala.bridge_concept_es: Transformar, cambiar es el significado central de H-P-K (dar la vuelta, invertir)

m-w-th.sabor_raiz_es: cesación, fin de la vida, mortalidad

heb:moná.bridge_concept_en: Talent/gift connects to N-B-Y (to prophesy, speak inspired words)
heb:moná.bridge_concept_es: Talento/regalo se conecta con N-B-Y (profetizar, hablar palabras inspiradas)

ar:wahīb.bridge_concept_en: Generous is a core meaning of K-R-M (to be generous, noble)
ar:wahīb.bridge_concept_es: Generoso es un significado central de K-R-M (ser generoso, noble)

ar:mawḥūb.bridge_concept_en: Talented/gifted connects to A-B-H (to have authority, to be important)
ar:mawḥūb.bridge_concept_es: Talentoso/dotado se conecta con A-B-H (tener autoridad, ser importante)

ar:sabaqa.bridge_concept_en: To precede/surpass connects to D-M-N (to come, arrive)

ar:tashabbaha.bridge_concept_en: To resemble/be like as core meaning of M-TH-L (to be like, similar)
ar:tashabbaha.bridge_concept_es: Asemejarse/ser como como significado central de M-TH-L (ser semejante, similar)

ar:tasabbaqa.bridge_concept_en: To precede, have priority connects to Q-D-M (to go before, precede)

ar:nasīb.bridge_concept_en: Kinsman/relative is a core meaning of A-KH-Y (brother, kinsman)
ar:nasīb.bridge_concept_es: Pariente/familiar es un significado central de A-KH-Y (hermano, pariente)

heb:'illem.bridge_concept_en: To silence/mute connects to KH-R-SH (to be silent, mute)
heb:'illem.bridge_concept_es: Silenciar/enmudecer conecta con KH-R-SH (estar en silencio, mudo)

heb:'alem.bridge_concept_en: To hide, conceal is a core meaning of G-N-Z
heb:'alem.bridge_concept_es: Ocultar, esconder es un significado central de G-N-Z

heb:nāfîš.bridge_concept_en: Prominent/distinguished connects to N-G-D (to be prominent, stand out)
heb:nāfîš.bridge_concept_es: Prominente/distinguido conecta con N-G-D (ser prominente, destacarse)

ar:rāwaḥa.bridge_concept_en: To rest, take ease connects to SH-B-TH (sabbath, rest)
ar:rāwaḥa.bridge_concept_es: Descansar, tener reposo conecta con SH-B-TH (sábado, descansar)

r-w-kh.sabor_raiz_es: aliento vital, movimiento invisible, esencia etérea
r-w-kh.sabor_raiz_en: vital breath, invisible movement, ethereal essence

ar:takahhan-na.bridge_concept_en: Divination/foretelling is central to the N-B-A root meaning 'to prophesy'

k-h-n.sabor_raiz_es: mediación sagrada, servicio ritual, intermediación divina
k-h-n.sabor_raiz_en: sacred mediation, ritual service, divine intermediation

ar:saba.bridge_concept_en: To blow (as wind) connects to R-W-KH (to be/become wide, spacious)
ar:saba.bridge_concept_es: Soplar (como el viento) se conecta con R-W-KH (ser/hacerse amplio, espacioso)

ar:sa'ib.bridge_concept_en: Blowing/flowing connects to N-H-R (to flow, stream)

ar:kanz.bridge_concept_en: Treasure/hoard connects to G-N-Z (to store, treasure, hide away)
ar:kanz.bridge_concept_es: Tesoro/acumular conecta con G-N-Z (almacenar, atesorar, ocultar)

hebrew.meaning_es: el que hace estar de pie

ar:farasha.bridge_concept_en: To spread connects to P-R-S (spread, separate (Pharisee))

ar:furshah.bridge_concept_en: Brush connects to KH-R-SH (be deaf, plow)

heb:hishtakke'akh.bridge_concept_en: To forget is a central meaning of N-S-Y (to forget, neglect)
heb:hishtakke'akh.bridge_concept_es: Olvidar es un significado central de N-S-Y (olvidar, descuidar)

heb:milkhama.bridge_concept_en: War is a central meaning of L-KH-M (to fight, wage war)
heb:milkhama.bridge_concept_es: La guerra es un significado central de L-KH-M (luchar, hacer la guerra)

ar:asfarā.bridge_concept_en: To dawn, appear connects to D-N-KH (shine, dawn)
ar:asfarā.bridge_concept_es: Amanecer, aparecer conecta con D-N-KH (brillar, amanecer)

ar:qabl.bridge_concept_en: Before connects to Q-D-M (before, front, precede)
ar:qabl.bridge_concept_es: Antes conecta con Q-D-M (antes, frente, preceder)

ar:infíllal.bridge_concept_en: To fall/exit is a core meaning of N-P-Q
ar:infíllal.bridge_concept_es: Caerse/salir es un significado central de N-P-Q

ar:falāḥah.bridge_concept_en: Agriculture/plowing connects to P-R-SH (to plow, cultivate)

ar:sharra.bridge_concept_en: To be evil connects to B-Y-SH (evil, bad)
ar:sharra.bridge_concept_es: Ser malo conecta con B-Y-SH (malo, malvado)

ar:sharīr.bridge_concept_en: Wicked/perverse as core meaning of R-SH-A (to be wicked, evil)
ar:sharīr.bridge_concept_es: Malvado/perverso como significado central de R-SH-A (ser malvado, malvado)

arabic.meaning_en: one who remains in his place

ar:mawḍib.bridge_concept_en: One who remains in his place connects to A-TH-R (place, land)
ar:mawḍib.bridge_concept_es: Que permanece en su sitio conecta con A-TH-R (lugar, tierra)

ar:shata.bridge_concept_en: To rain (winter) connects to SH-Q-Y (give to drink, irrigate)
ar:shata.bridge_concept_es: Llover (invierno) conecta con SH-Q-Y (dar de beber, regar)

hebrew.meaning_en: the one who seeks, the applicant

ar:maṭlūb.bridge_concept_en: Sought, required connects to M-T-Y (to come, arrive)
ar:maṭlūb.bridge_concept_es: Buscado, requerido se conecta con M-T-Y (venir, llegar)

heb:nish'má.bridge_concept_en: To be heard, to sound connects to N-SH-A (to rise, appear)
heb:nish'má.bridge_concept_es: Ser oído, sonar se conecta con N-SH-A (levantarse, aparecer)

ar:wada'a.bridge_concept_en: To leave/deposit connects to D-M-N (to come, arrive)

ar:wasi'a.bridge_concept_en: Spaciousness/abundance connects to R-W-KH (to be spacious, wide, ample)
ar:wasi'a.bridge_concept_es: Amplitud/abundancia conecta con R-W-KH (ser espacioso, ancho, abundante)

ar:ittasa'a.bridge_concept_en: To expand/become spacious connects to R-W-KH (to breathe, be spacious)

ar:waḥīd.bridge_concept_en: Uniqueness/singularity connects to A-KH-D (to take, grasp, hold)

ar:saja.bridge_concept_en: To be calm/extensive connects to S-K-N (to dwell, settle)

ar:mar'.bridge_concept_en: The root A-N-SH has 'man/person' as a core meaning, which connects to the outlier meaning of MAR' (man/person).
ar:mar'.bridge_concept_es: La raíz A-N-SH tiene 'hombre/persona' como un significado central, que se conecta con el significado de la palabra derivada MAR' (hombre/persona).

ar:yawm al-qiyama.bridge_concept_en: Day of Judgment is the core meaning of Q-Y-M (to stand up, rise, be established)

ar:madina.bridge_concept_en: City as a place of assembly/gathering, connected to the core meaning of Q-R-Y (to gather, assemble)
ar:madina.bridge_concept_es: La ciudad como un lugar de asamblea/reunión, conectado con el significado central de Q-R-Y (reunir, congregar)

ar:zabun.bridge_concept_en: Customer/client as a core meaning of A-B-D (to worship, serve)
ar:zabun.bridge_concept_es: Cliente/cliente como significado central de A-B-D (adorar, servir)

ar:mas'ala.bridge_concept_en: Matter/issue connects to A-M-R (command, order, affair)
ar:mas'ala.bridge_concept_es: Asunto/cuestión se conecta con A-M-R (orden, comisión, asunto)

ar:mas'ul.bridge_concept_en: Responsibility connects to A-M-N (to be reliable, trustworthy)
ar:mas'ul.bridge_concept_es: Responsabilidad conecta con A-M-N (ser confiable, digno de confianza)

heb:mevuyash.bridge_concept_en: Ashamed, embarrassed connects to B-H-TH (be ashamed)

ar:'amm.bridge_concept_en: The core meaning of A-KH-Y includes 'paternal uncle'

ar:mustaliḳ.bridge_concept_en: Lying down/reclining is a core meaning of R-Q-D (to lie down, recline)

ar:iftaqada.bridge_concept_es: Echar de menos, anhelar se conecta con N-SH-A (desear, anhelar)

ar:hiwar.bridge_concept_en: Dialogue connects to D-B-R (to speak, converse)
ar:hiwar.bridge_concept_es: Diálogo se conecta con D-B-R (hablar, conversar)

ar:hayyara.bridge_concept_en: To confuse, disturb connects to D-M-R (to be amazed, astonished)
ar:hayyara.bridge_concept_es: Confundir, perturbar conecta con D-M-R (sorprenderse, admirarse)

heb:'anayah.bridge_concept_en: Poverty is a central meaning of A-B-D (to be a servant, be in bondage)

heb:'an'vah.bridge_concept_en: Humility connects to A-B-H (to be humble, submit)
heb:'an'vah.bridge_concept_es: Humildad conecta con A-B-H (ser humilde, someterse)

ar:'anatul.bridge_concept_en: Patience/endurance as a core meaning of S-B-R
ar:'anatul.bridge_concept_es: Paciencia/aguante como significado central de S-B-R

ar:'aniinun.bridge_concept_en: Groan connects to N-KH-R (to grunt, groan)
ar:'aniinun.bridge_concept_es: Gemir se conecta con N-KH-R (gruñir, gemir)

ar:nazara.bridge_concept_en: To look/observe is central to the meaning of N-Z-R (to look, behold, perceive)
ar:nazara.bridge_concept_es: Mirar/observar es central al significado de N-Z-R (mirar, contemplar, percibir)

ar:nazar.bridge_concept_en: Sight/gaze is a core meaning of A-Y-N (eye)
ar:nazar.bridge_concept_es: Vista/mirada es un significado central de A-Y-N (ojo)

ar:naẓir.bridge_concept_es: El significado 'observador' es central a la raíz N-Z-R, que significa principalmente 'observar, vigilar, guardar'

ar:manẓar.bridge_concept_en: View/appearance as part of the core meaning of M-R-Y (to see, observe)
ar:manẓar.bridge_concept_es: Vista/apariencia como parte del significado central de M-R-Y (ver, observar)

heb:shriirut.bridge_concept_en: Arbitrariness is a core meaning of A-L-TS (to turn aside, be crooked)
heb:shriirut.bridge_concept_es: Arbitrariedad es un significado central de A-L-TS (desviarse, estar torcido)

ar:darb.bridge_concept_en: Path/door as a core meaning of D-R-B (to strike, beat a path)

ar:matrūk.bridge_concept_en: Left open (as a door) connects to Y-TH-R (remain, be left over)

ar:salakha.bridge_concept_en: To skin/pass (time) connects to D-M-R (to be amazed, astonished)

arabic.meaning_en: place of the earth, plot of land

ar:ma'radah.bridge_concept_es: Lugar de la tierra, parcela de tierra conecta con E-R-S (tierra, tierra)

ar:rajaza.bridge_concept_en: To tremble/recite connects to D-M-R (to be amazed, astonished)

ar:rajjaza.bridge_concept_es: El significado de 'recitar con entusiasmo' es central a la raíz Q-R-A, que significa 'leer, recitar'

heb:'olal.bridge_concept_en: Young child is a core meaning of Y-L-D (to bear, give birth)
heb:'olal.bridge_concept_es: Niño pequeño es un significado central de Y-L-D (dar a luz, parir)

ar:'illa.bridge_concept_en: Causing harm, disease, or illness is central to the A-S-R root
ar:'illa.bridge_concept_es: Causar daño, enfermedad o enfermedad es central para la raíz A-S-R

heb:barur.bridge_concept_en: Clear, pure connects to D-K-Y (pure, clean)
heb:barur.bridge_concept_es: Claro, puro conecta con D-K-Y (puro, limpio)

heb:bri'.bridge_concept_en: Healthy, sound connects to Q-L-L (voice, sound)
heb:bri'.bridge_concept_es: Sano, saludable conecta con Q-L-L (voz, sonido)

ar:'adhara.bridge_concept_en: To excuse connects to E-TH-R (to pardon, forgive)

ar:'udhr.bridge_concept_es: 'Excusa' se conecta con A-TH-R (rastro, señal, razón)

heb:n'vu'ah.bridge_concept_en: Prophecy is central to the meaning of N-B-Y (to prophesy)

ar:inbāʾun.bridge_concept_en: Announcement connects to A-M-R (to command, order)
ar:inbāʾun.bridge_concept_es: Anuncio se conecta con A-M-R (ordenar, mandar)

ar:jazr.bridge_concept_es: La bajamar (marea) se relaciona con N-H-R (fluir, corriente)

ar:farraqa.bridge_concept_en: To separate/divide is core to the meaning of the root P-L-G (to divide, split, separate)
ar:farraqa.bridge_concept_es: Separar/dividir es central al significado de la raíz P-L-G (dividir, separar, partir)

ar:farrrash.bridge_concept_en: Cleaning staff connects to N-SH-A (to lift, carry)
ar:farrrash.bridge_concept_es: Personal de limpieza se conecta con N-SH-A (levantar, cargar)

ar:iftarasa.bridge_concept_en: to devour, tear apart is a core meaning of A-K-L (to eat)

ar:rabi'.bridge_concept_en: Spring (season) connects to R-B-Y (to grow, thrive)

ar:'asrah.bridge_concept_en: Family, lineage is central to A-B-H (father, patriarch)
ar:'asrah.bridge_concept_es: Familia, linaje es central a A-B-H (padre, patriarca)

ar:'isārah.bridge_concept_es: Cautiverio/esclavitud es un significado central de A-B-D (servir, ser esclavo)

ar:jamarah.bridge_concept_es: Reunir brasas es una extensión metonímica del significado central de KH-B-R (tener/adquirir/ganar conocimiento)

kh-w-b.sabor_raiz_es: vinculación, obligación afectiva, deuda del corazón

heb:'amar.bridge_concept_en: To gather sheaves connects to K-N-SH (to gather, collect)

heb:ma'ămār.bridge_concept_es: Estructura, asamblea conecta con B-N-A (construir, edificar)

ar:'umar.bridge_concept_es: El nombre 'Omar' deriva de la raíz A-M-R, que significa 'mandar, ordenar'

heb:miflaga.bridge_concept_en: Political party relates to the core meaning of M-L-K (kingdom, rule)

heb:palganut.bridge_concept_es: Faccionalismo se conecta con N-KH-SH (dividir, separar)

heb:pəlīgāh.bridge_concept_en: Schism, dissension connects to R-KH-Q (to be distant, to separate)
heb:pəlīgāh.bridge_concept_es: Cisma, disensión se conecta con R-KH-Q (estar distante, separarse)

heb:shavit.bridge_concept_en: Captive/prisoner is the core meaning of A-S-R
heb:shavit.bridge_concept_es: Cautivo/prisionero es el significado central de A-S-R

heb:'ashan.bridge_concept_en: Smoke is a core meaning of the root A-TH-R (to burn, smoke)

heb:mul'mad.bridge_concept_es: Erudito/aprendido como significado central de A-L-P (enseñar, instruir)

ar:iltifāt.bridge_concept_en: Attention and understanding connect to A-L-P (to learn, teach)
ar:iltifāt.bridge_concept_es: Atención y entendimiento se conectan con A-L-P (aprender, enseñar)

heb:ḥāder.bridge_concept_en: Room/chamber is central to the meaning of E-D-R (abode, dwelling)
heb:ḥāder.bridge_concept_es: Habitación/cámara es central al significado de E-D-R (morada, vivienda)

ar:ḥadāṯa.bridge_concept_en: Novelty/modernity as a semantic shift from core meaning of 'newness, freshness' in Kh-D-Th
ar:ḥadāṯa.bridge_concept_es: Novedad/modernidad como un cambio semántico del significado central de 'novedad, frescura' en Kh-D-Th

e-s-r.sabor_raiz_en: group of ten, complete set, decimal division

ar:abada.bridge_concept_en: Eternity (semantic cognate) connects to E-L-M (world, eternity)
ar:abada.bridge_concept_es: Eternidad (cognado semántico) conecta con E-L-M (mundo, eternidad)

ar:ʿabad.bridge_concept_en: The root E-B-D has 'to worship, to serve' as a core meaning, in contrast with the outlier meaning of A-B-D which has 'perish, destroy'.
ar:ʿabad.bridge_concept_es: La raíz E-B-D tiene 'adorar, servir' como un significado central, en contraste con el significado de la palabra atípica de A-B-D que es 'perecer, destruir'.

ar:ʿābid.bridge_concept_en: Worshipper/devotee is central to the meaning of E-B-D
ar:ʿābid.bridge_concept_es: Adorador/devoto es central al significado de E-B-D

ar:ʿabūd.bridge_concept_en: The root E-B-D (to serve, worship, be a slave) has 'subjected, enslaved' as a core meaning
ar:ʿabūd.bridge_concept_es: La raíz E-B-D (servir, adorar, ser esclavo) tiene 'sometido, esclavizado' como un significado central

arabic.meaning_en: to clear up, to become evident

hebrew.meaning_en: to cut, to decide, to cease

ar:rā'id.bridge_concept_en: Explorer/leader connects to N-B-A (to spring up, appear, announce)
ar:rā'id.bridge_concept_es: Explorador/líder se conecta con N-B-A (surgir, aparecer, anunciar)

arabic.meaning_en: and who, and the one who

ar:munī'.bridge_concept_en: Impregnable, inaccessible connects to A-B-H (exalted, sublime)
ar:munī'.bridge_concept_es: Inexpugnable, inaccesible se conecta con A-B-H (exaltado, sublime)

ar:damirah.bridge_concept_en: To be destroyed, ruined connects to KH-R-B (destroy, sword)
ar:damirah.bridge_concept_es: Estar destruido, arruinado conecta con KH-R-B (destruir, espada)

ar:madmúr.bridge_concept_en: Destroyed/ruined connects to Kh-R-B (to destroy, ruin)
